hero.eyebrow: Premium Mobile Detailing · West Linn, OR
hero.lead: Hand detailing for your car, SUV, or truck — done right where you park it. No drop-off, no waiting rooms, just a showroom finish at home or work.

why_us.heading: Detailing backed by
why_us.subheading: This isn't a wipe-and-go operation. Every product, every method, and every vehicle is researched before we ever touch your car.

cards.title: Chemistry-First Approach
cards.description: Every product is chosen for pH balance, surface compatibility, and how it interacts with your specific paint and interior materials — not just because it's what's on the shelf.

cards.title: Researched Before We Arrive
cards.description: We look into your vehicle's make, model, and known trouble spots ahead of time, so we know exactly what it needs before we ever park in your driveway.

cards.title: A Profile For Every Car
cards.description: We're building a growing database on every vehicle we detail — tracking what works, what to avoid, and how it ages — so each future visit gets even more precise.

services.heading: Two packages.
services.subheading: Pricing varies by vehicle size. Every detail is done by hand, on-site, using premium products — and Deluxe builds on everything in Refresh.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Detail
features: Deep wheel, tire & wheel well cleaning
UV interior protectant on all plastics
deluxe.best_for: Pre-sale, seasonal, or first-time deep clean

upsell.title: Heavy Pet Hair Removal
upsell.description: homes with pets often need more than a standard vacuum. Add deep pet hair extraction for {refresh_price} with Refresh Detail, or {deluxe_price} with Deluxe Detail (which already includes light pet hair removal).

membership_extra.heading: Shine All
membership_extra.intro: A membership for owners who want their car to always look its best — without thinking about booking it. One monthly detail, a reserved spot on the calendar, and real perks that add up.

gallery_extra.heading: See the
gallery_extra.subheading: A look at real vehicles we've detailed. Photos are added directly by High School Shine and update automatically.

area.heading: Currently serving the
area.description: Based in West Linn, we're expanding north into the Portland metro. Don't see your city listed? Reach out — we may already be headed your way.

about_extra.quote: We treat every car like it's about to be judged in a school parking lot — because attention to detail is the whole point.
about_extra.heading: Premium detailing,
about_extra.heading_highlight: built on the basics done right.
about_extra.description: High School Shine is a mobile detailing business based in West Linn, Oregon. We started with one simple idea: every car deserves a real, hands-on detail — not a rushed drive-through wash — without the customer having to go anywhere.

list_items.title: Fully Mobile
list_items.description: We bring our own equipment, water, and power to your location.

list_items.title: Professional-Grade Products
list_items.description: P&S, CarPro, and Griot's Garage — trusted by detailers nationwide.

list_items.title: Honest Pricing
list_items.description: Two clear packages, priced by vehicle size — no upsell surprises.

contact_extra.heading: Let's get your car
contact_extra.description: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you with availability and a confirmed quote — usually within a day.
